overall_summary: Big gap to reference, but the data shows exactly where it is hiding. Attack these points. Current gap: 45.306s slower than reference. The biggest opportunity is Sector 1 (+48.439s), where 82.3 km/h is being left on the table through the corners. These corrections alone are worth 1.19s. That is a significant step forward.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed is 37.7 km/h below reference (56.7 vs 94.4 km/h). Significant corner exit speed deficit.
priority_actions.instruction: Despite a late brake point, apex speed is below reference — car not rotating. Use higher initial brake pressure to pitch the car in, trail off through apex. Hit 94 km/h and the exit speed takes care of itself.
priority_actions.evidence: Apex: 56.7 km/h vs 94.4 km/h reference (-37.7 km/h).

priority_actions.issue: Losing 2.1 km/h at the apex (63.4 vs 65.5 km/h).
